title: lycopersicon pimpinellifolium
intro: Lycopersicon pimpinellifolium, also known as the wild tomato, is a perennial plant native to South America, belonging to the Solanaceae family. The leaves and fruits of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lycopersicon pimpinellifolium include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
